block_00: How to create your own trading strategy.
block_01: As promised, today we are talking strategy. Although coming up with one can seem daunting, it doesn’t have to be that way. Here’s how you can create your own trading strategy in 5 steps.
block_02: Step 1. Choose the market you want to trade
block_03: Forex, stocks, and options all differ. Your strategy should be fined-tuned to a particular market.
block_05: Will it be a one-day trade or longer term? This can also depend on the instrument you are trading.
block_07: There is a time and place for every indicator, but you should do your research first.
block_09: Most traders come up with a list of market conditions according to which the deal should be opened.
block_11: Exit is the time when you lock in your payouts, so you should have a plan for when it is time to close the trade.
block_13: Remember: A strategy is meant to help you trade smarter, not harder. It enables you to stay focused, helps to identify mistakes, and ensures your decisions are based on facts.
